steps.title: Present both findings
steps.content: The task asks for the study's findings. The notes list two empirical results: marigold FTWs removed more total phosphorus than the control and produced market-quality blooms.

steps.title: Avoid misstating the data
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes the authors' conclusion instead of the findings. Choice B wrongly applies the 52% figure to blooms. Choice D says 65 blooms without the per-square-meter detail and blurs the phosphorus result. The remaining choice accurately presents both findings. The answer is C.
